transcript.text:
[Fried Chicken at Han River!] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
['Good Fried' (Brand) Chicken]
[Their new menu item: King Triple Spicy Chicken]
[Don't forget about Cass beer!]
[Has she been here all day?!]
[Mukbang does not stop]
[Let's enjoy mukbang at Han River]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Han River
Check this out I thought they only had paddle boats here
But there are tube-shaped boats too!
They said that you can eat food on the boat So I'll be doing mukbang here
Let's get on
[Life Jackets are a must!]
That looks amazing
I'm going to go off and do mukbang

How do I drive this thing?
[Tubester Steering Wheel]
[Explaining how it works]
Do you see the buoys over there?
The propellers can get caught, so stay away from those
I'll send you off now Okay!
We're going! x4
There's the 63 Building I'll put that in the background
Oh no!
What do I do?
[Where to go?]
It's spinning again!
I can't go near it
Help me!!!
It's been caught
[Where's the 63 Building?!]

I think the propellers got caught
It's fine, I can undo it I'm sorry
Thank you sir!
Now for the food
This is Snow Cheese
King Triple Spicy Chicken here It's their new item
It comes with Cheese King & Creamy King sauces
They go with this specific one
Original Fried Chicken here
And Hot-tos Chicken
Deep-fried Cheese Balls and SoTteok-SoTteok (Sausage Rice Cake Skewers)
Let's try the Cheese King sauce first
[Cheesy waves]
Creamy King sauce too
[Creaminess overload]
Bon appetit

Cubed pickled radish first
That's so tasty
I need 1 more to explain the taste
[Sirens]
Are they coming for me?
They're not coming for me, right?
[Let's just eat]
A very tasty spicy sauce base,
With very strong cheddar cheese flavors
And some sweet creamy sauce
That combination is just insane
This has to be their signature menu item
The sauce itself is really delicious I think it should go well with anything
Let's put it on Snow Cheese for that double cheese
Covered in cheese
This sauce is really good

Boneless chicken is so tender
Some creamy sauce too
On the Cheetos(?)
I mean on the Hot-tos They said this is a little spicy
Some creamy sauce on top
Yummy
There are 4 different flavors of SoTteok-SoTteok
Spicy, Sweet & Spicy
Cheese, and Spicy Cheese
Let's try the Cheese one first
That's really big
Delicious
[With the universal sauce!]
The sauce is amazing
Perfection
There are some seasoning on it

It's salty and tasty
It just feels so nice to be outside instead of being indoors all the time
But I have to head inside now
I was planning on drinking some beer today
And they said I cannot drive around with alcohol
So I'll have to go back to the marina for some beer
Let's go~!
Go!
Yes, just like that Go straight
You've been caught on something again
[2nd Distress]
It's fine I can just undo it again for you
Drive safe
[I give up]
Ta-da!
Now that the Tubester is parked,

I can have some beer with the life jacket off
Driving this thing was mission
I like it here
Some beer!
[Chicken and Beer at Han River is a must]
Cass glass bottles have always been like this?
It's really pretty
Han River is Chicken and Beer~!
That's a good pour
Beer=Cass!
Eating like this at Han River?
These are Snow Cheese seasoned fries
It's got a lot of seasoning on it
Can you guys see that? It's really tasty
Fried chicken at 'Good Fried' chicken!
Too plain and boring by itself

Some more Cheese sauce
Oh no!
I've become spicy
[You can never go wrong with cheese]
This cheddar cheese sauce is so good
[1 more time!]
Yum
Their fried chicken is so good
It has a kick to it
I had it before
And I enjoyed it very much
Cheese ball
I'm going to put this on everything
[Double cheese]
Let's try the Hot-tos chicken by itself
I love eating boneless

It really does taste like Cheetos
That's spicy!
Hot-tos is spicy
But it's a good type of spicy Just like the chips
[Some more sauce]
Wow, it looks new
Hot-tos this time
It's starting to get dark
It's going to be so pretty at night
Let's turn on the lights
That's pretty Thank you
They're on! It's pretty
The lights
I think this is today's best (King Triple Spicy Chicken)
Really good
[Some ice]

Now that's going to be cold Beer has to be cold
Some beer!
So refreshing~!!
Fried skin!
I love this part
I want to eat just the skin
[After a restroom break]
It's gorgeous
I just went to the restroom
It wasn't for long and it's already gotten dark
It's very pretty
Han River at night is where it's at
The lights are pretty too
It's been raining all-day Must've gotten dark quick because of the clouds
[Mukbang never stops]
It's so juicy inside

Spicy flavor
That nostalgic skewer smell
It's really chewy and delicious
And beer after some rice cake
This sweet & salty combination
Last time I ate here, I picked their Original Fried Chicken as their best
But today, I like the King Triple Spicy Chicken more
Look at that, that's so pretty
[A perfect place for a date]
Next,
Last drumstick
You see that juiciness?
[Refill the beer!]
It tastes good with some foam
It's been a while since I've eaten at Han River like this
Ever since Covid broke out

I would by Han River with friends to have a picnic before the pandemic
Let's get some sauce on it again
This is a must
Just like this
Chicken sauce(?) too
I mean Cheese sauce
It tastes best with the sauces on like this
Cheese ball
So much cheese inside Chewy
I feel a little tipsy but is it from the beer or the ambience?
[Growls]
[Whose stomach was that?]
Producer, was that your stomach growling?
He was not able to eat anything since afternoon
I will give him some
Our PD is 90kgs...

[Let's edit that out ^^] Is that too little?
Thank you
SoTteok-SoTteok! (Sweet & Spicy)
That's spicy!
People say that you have to eat the rice cake and the sausage together
But I prefer eating them individually
[Please don't do that to us!]
[I like it like this better]
[Cleared]
That's good
That's spicy
[Here it comes]
I need something non-spicy right now
[There you go]
Spicy cheese flavor
This is good too!

It's got a very strong cheese flavor
[I love fried chicken skin]
I will save this for last since this is the best
This SoTteok-SoTteok is really spicy so I have to be careful
Let's eat it all at once (???)
[Trying not to drop it]
[Spiciness ON]
[Cool it down with Snow Cheese chicken]
Some fries when it's too spicy
[It's still spicy...!]
Now for the King Triple Spicy Chicken that I've been looking forward to
Last piece!
[Chicken & Beer]
I've always been eating indoors lately
I enjoyed eating outdoors for a change with a nice view
I also loved their new menu item

The sauce that come with it was really delicious They go well with every other chicken flavor!
I also like how you can eat the chicken according to your own preference
Thanks everyone~
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Saeupim (SRP Love) Regional Children's Center'] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
